item.title: Driving a Military Truck on the Farm
item.description: A farm vehicle test drive featuring a military-style truck, showing handling, terrain use, and practical off-road performance in rural conditions.

media:content.media:title: Driving a Military Truck on the Farm
media:content.media:description: A farm vehicle test drive featuring a military-style truck, showing handling, terrain use, and practical off-road performance in rural conditions.

item.title: Refreshing Drinks on the Farm Day
item.description: A relaxed day on the farm featuring refreshing drinks, breaks between work, and moments of rest during a busy agricultural routine.

media:content.media:title: Refreshing Drinks on the Farm Day
media:content.media:description: A relaxed day on the farm featuring refreshing drinks, breaks between work, and moments of rest during a busy agricultural routine.

item.title: A New Chapter on the Farm
item.description: A fresh start on the farm brings new projects, daily work, and changes across the land. A look at rural life and ongoing farming operations.

media:content.media:title: A New Chapter on the Farm
media:content.media:description: A fresh start on the farm brings new projects, daily work, and changes across the land. A look at rural life and ongoing farming operations.

item.title: Farm Truck Gets Stuck in the Field
item.description: A farm truck gets stuck in muddy field conditions. Recovery efforts show real challenges of farm work, heavy equipment use, and unpredictable terrain.

media:content.media:title: Farm Truck Gets Stuck in the Field
media:content.media:description: A farm truck gets stuck in muddy field conditions. Recovery efforts show real challenges of farm work, heavy equipment use, and unpredictable terrain.

item.title: Tracking a Bull in the Trees
item.description: A bull is tracked through wooded terrain on the farm. Careful movement and awareness are needed as livestock handling continues in a natural, challenging environment.

media:content.media:title: Tracking a Bull in the Trees
media:content.media:description: A bull is tracked through wooded terrain on the farm. Careful movement and awareness are needed as livestock handling continues in a natural, challenging environment.

item.title: Why Planting Corn Is So Costly
item.description: Corn planting comes with high costs from seed, fuel, equipment, and timing. A look at the real expenses farmers face during the planting season.

media:content.media:title: Why Planting Corn Is So Costly
media:content.media:description: Corn planting comes with high costs from seed, fuel, equipment, and timing. A look at the real expenses farmers face during the planting season.

item.title: Gray Day in the Farm Fields
item.description: A cloudy day working in the fields shows steady farm routines. Equipment runs, tasks continue, and daily agricultural work carries on despite overcast weather.

media:content.media:title: Gray Day in the Farm Fields
media:content.media:description: A cloudy day working in the fields shows steady farm routines. Equipment runs, tasks continue, and daily agricultural work carries on despite overcast weather.

item.title: Hidden Costs of Running a Farm
item.description: A closer look at overlooked expenses in farming operations. Breaking down unexpected costs, maintenance needs, and how they impact day-to-day farm budgeting and planning.

media:content.media:title: Hidden Costs of Running a Farm
media:content.media:description: A closer look at overlooked expenses in farming operations. Breaking down unexpected costs, maintenance needs, and how they impact day-to-day farm budgeting and planning.

item.title: Moving and Dumping Large Farm Piles
item.description: A look at handling and dumping large material piles on the farm. Heavy equipment work, cleanup process, and efficient field management in action.

media:content.media:title: Moving and Dumping Large Farm Piles
media:content.media:description: A look at handling and dumping large material piles on the farm. Heavy equipment work, cleanup process, and efficient field management in action.

item.title: How a Farm Row Got Missed
item.description: A look at how a planting or harvesting row was missed in the field. Simple breakdown of equipment tracking, field conditions, and how the mistake happened.

media:content.media:title: How a Farm Row Got Missed
media:content.media:description: A look at how a planting or harvesting row was missed in the field. Simple breakdown of equipment tracking, field conditions, and how the mistake happened.
